event: Landscape of Saint-Cloud along the Seine
description: A tranquil riverside landscape depicting the banks of the Seine at Saint-Cloud. In the foreground, boats are moored along the muddy bank where a few small figures stand near the water's edge. A wooden walkway or dock extends into the river. In the middle distance, a small white house and tall poplar trees line the far bank. A church spire is faintly visible in the hazy background. The sky is soft and luminous with pale yellows and grays, suggesting early morning or late afternoon light.

_meta.title: Saint Cloud, Banks of the Seine
